name: mostWriteReg
title: mostWriteReg
syntax: long mostWriteReg(long channel, long chip, dword offset, long regdatalen, byte regdata[]);
description: Writes to one or more registers of a MOST hardware chip.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel to which the hardware is connected

parameters.name: chip
parameters.description: Number of the MOST hardware chip (1 = OS8104; other chips cannot be accessed yet)

parameters.name: regdatalen
parameters.description: Number of registers to be written (maximum 16)

parameters.name: regdata[]
parameters.description: A byte buffer at least regdatalen in size with the data to be written

availability: MOST25 After measurement start Not in StopMeasurement
MOST25 After measurement start Not in StopMeasurement
CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
